name: Email Attachment with Executable
notes: This rule triggers when an email is received containing attachments with executable file extensions.
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Mail
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Content Information
when the event matches File Extension (custom) is not N/A
when any of File Extension (custom) are contained in any of Executable Extensions - AlphaNumeric (Ignore Case)
TD_list: APPLY Email Attachment with Executable on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Mail
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Content Information
AND when the event matches File Extension (custom) is not N/A
AND when any of File Extension (custom) are contained in any of Executable Extensions - AlphaNumeric (Ignore Case)
RED_list: Event name: Email Attachment with Executable
Event description: Detects when an email is received containing attachments with executable file extensions.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Sender (custom)
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
